data.title: Ethereum's Value at Risk Without Monetary Status, Says Expert
data.description: According to Foresight News, Evan Van Ness, founder of Ethereum Weekly, expressed concerns on social media about the future valuation of Ethereum (ETH). Van Ness highlighted that if ETH is not recognized as a 'currency,' its price could potentially plummet to near zero. He explained that using the discounted cash flow (DCF) method to assess ETH's value without attributing a monetary premium would result in its price declining not only against fiat currencies but also when compared to other cryptocurrencies.

data.title: China's 84% ​​tariff on the United States has officially come into effect at 12:01 today.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the announcement of the General Administration of Customs of China on April 9, from 12:01 today, all imported goods originating from the United States will be subject to an additional tariff of 84% on the basis of the current applicable tariff rate. (People's Daily)

data.title: Wayfinder to distribute 5 million PROMPT tokens via Kaito Dashboard
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Wayfinder Foundation tweeted that the KaitoAI social task plan has completed the snapshot and officially ended on April 8, and 5 million PROMPT tokens will be issued through the Kaito Dashboard. Among them, 4 million will be allocated to "Emerging Yappers" who have reached 90 Yaps and less than 1,100 fans, and the remaining 1 million will be awarded to users who have not reached the standard but have contributed. Eligible users holding KAITO can also get an additional 30% bonus.

data.title: Binance's second round of "voting to delist" projects announced: FTT, ZEC and other 17 projects are on the list
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official post, Binance has announced the second round of "voting to delist" candidate projects, including FTT, ZEC, JASMY, STPT, ARK, ARDR, GPS, MBL, PERP, NKN, WING, LTO, FLM, BSW, ALPACA, VOXEL and PDA.

data.title: Binance Launches Spot Copy Trading Promotion
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch a spot copy trading promotion from 04:00 (UTC) on April 10, 2025 to 23:59 (UTC) on May 8, 2025. Participating users will have the opportunity to share 20,000 USDC voucher rewards. The event is divided into two parts: A. Users who participate in simulated spot copy trading for the first time and achieve a return of more than 5% can get 1 USDC voucher; B. Users who follow different lead traders in spot copy trading can get up to 3 USDC vouchers. The rewards will be issued within 21 working days after the end of the event. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Gate Releases 2025 Q1 Report: Transactions, Reserves, and Users Grow Across the Board
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate officially released its transparency report for the first quarter of 2025, with many core business indicators reaching new highs. The report shows that the platform's contract trading volume increased by about 31% month-on-month, with more than 200 spot currencies listed; the platform currency GT hit a record high of US$25.96, with a year-to-date increase of nearly 70%; the total value of reserves exceeded US$10.328 billion, ranking fourth among similar platforms in the world, with a reserve rate as high as 128.58%.
In addition, Gate continues to make efforts in Launchpool, Meme Innovation Zone, quantitative copy trading, institutional services and other sectors, significantly improving trading efficiency and user experience; at the same time, it accelerates the advancement of its globalization strategy through initiatives such as sponsoring the F1 Red Bull team and increasing global investment layout.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of 11.1873 million US dollars yesterday, and none of the nine ETFs had a net inflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 9, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was $11.1873 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of $5.7329 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached $1.405 billion.
The second is BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net outflow of $5.4544 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached $4.048 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $5.557 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Ethereum's total market value) is 2.75%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $2.344 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$127 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 5 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 9, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$127 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Bitwise ETF BITB, with a single-day net inflow of US$6.7123 million. Currently, BITB's total net inflow has reached US$1.976 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock Bitcoin ETF IBIT, with a single-day net outflow of US$89.7123 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$39.568 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$91.79 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) reached 5.56%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$35.51 billion.

data.title: Huobi HTX releases Merkle Tree Reserve Proof for April 2025: Multi-currency Excess Reserves, and Asset Deposits Continue to Grow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official website of Huobi HTX, the Merkle tree asset proof data updated by Huobi HTX on April 1 showed that the overall asset reserve rate of the platform remained above 100%, and the platform's security strength continued to increase. The specific updated reserve rates are: BTC (101%), ETH (100%), TRX (105%), USDT (101%), HTX (105%), XRP (101%), DOGE (100%), SOL (101%).
The data shows that the overall asset deposit volume of Huobi HTX has increased significantly, among which USDT user assets have increased from about 665 million to 1.15 billion, an increase of more than 73% compared to March, showing a strong trend of net inflow of user assets, indicating that users continue to trust the platform and increase their asset holdings.
It is reported that a reserve rate higher than or equal to 100% means that the platform has the ability to redeem 100% of user assets, which is an important indicator for measuring the security and transparency of the platform. As one of the earliest platforms in the industry to adopt the Merkle tree verification mechanism, Huobi HTX has publicly disclosed reserve data for 30 consecutive months. Users can visit the "Asset-Reserve Proof Report" page on the Huobi HTX official website at any time to view the monthly updated reserve proof report.

data.title: Binance will launch the second round of voting to delist on April 10
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance will start the second batch of voting delisting activities on April 10.
The voting period will start in 30 minutes and last for seven days from 2025-04-10 04:00 (UTC) to 2025-04-16 23:59 (UTC) ("Voting Period"). Users must log in to their verified Binance account and hold at least 0.01 BNB in ​​their trading account throughout the voting period to be eligible for voting. During the voting period, each user can vote for up to 5 projects in the voting delisting pool, or choose projects with fewer votes. Each verified account can only be assigned one vote for each project.
